gaps.description: Hardware detector — detect GPU/memory/arch/OS (hardware.js)
Remote profiles — GitHub raw URL with 4-tier fallback: fresh cache → remote fetch → expired cache → built-in default.json (profiles.js)
Ollama integration — auto-install + model pull (ollama.js)
Basic HTTP service — REST API with chat/transcribe/synthesize/status/config endpoints (api.js)
Web UI (minimal) — Vue 3 + Vite client with text chat (src/ui/client/)
One-click install — npx agentic-service via bin/agentic-service.js + src/cli/setup.js
STT integration — adaptive provider selection: sensevoice for apple-silicon, whisper for nvidia, cloud fallback for cpu-only (stt.js)
TTS integration — adaptive provider selection: kokoro/piper local, cloud fallback (tts.js)
Web UI voice — useVAD.js + useWakeWord.js composables for hold-to-talk and wake word
Wake word detection — startWakeWordPipeline() with node-record-lpcm16 + energy-based VAD (sense.js)
Multi-device WebSocket — device registration, heartbeat, joinSession/broadcastSession with brainState (hub.js)
Visual perception — sense.js exports both detect(frame) returning {faces, gestures, objects} and event-based start()/stop() loop
Device tools — sendCommand() supports capture/speak/display with capture timeout handling (hub.js)
Admin panel — static files served from dist/admin at /admin; sources device list from GET /api/status and config from GET /api/config
Cloud fallback — brain.js implements full fallback: FIRST_TOKEN_TIMEOUT_MS=5000, MAX_ERRORS=3 consecutive errors, PROBE_INTERVAL_MS=60000 auto-restore
Config hot-reload — watchProfiles() polls every 30s with ETag-based conditional fetching (profiles.js)
Docker deployment — Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml with port 1234, OLLAMA_HOST env var, ./data volume mount
HTTPS — httpsServer.js + cert.js functional; LAN tunnel (tunnel.js) with ngrok/cloudflared support
Server-side VAD — energy-based VAD in vad.js + hub.js isSilent()
Voice latency <2s — profiler.js measurePipeline() enforces 2000ms budget; /api/voice logs latency and warns on exceed
CPU profiling — profiler.js with startMark/endMark/getMetrics; integrated into stt.js, tts.js, llm.js
KV store + vector embedding — store.js exports get/set/del/delete; embed.js wraps agentic-embed
hub.js heartbeat timeout — 60s (60000ms) matching canonical value
mDNS/Bonjour for .local hostname discovery — nice-to-have; tunnel.js (ngrok/cloudflared) provides acceptable LAN access alternative
Documentation + README — README.md with install methods, API endpoints, architecture, troubleshooting section
Test suite — 181 test files present in codebase
Root Dockerfile EXPOSE 1234 — matches service default port
